system.flavor: You charge your target with unstable magnetic energy.
system.effect:
Mark the end of target's turn, one of the following effects takes place:
• Positive all adjacent characters 1d3 spaces.
• Negative all characters in range 1-3 1d3 spaces.
• Dissolution all characters 1
Afflicted characters are pushed, pulled, or teleported +1 more spaces, or +2 more spaces if they have 3 or more negative status tokens.
